description: macFUSE 5.2.0 uses FSKit on macOS 26+, eliminating the NFS translation layer that causes 8-9x performance overhead. Our libfuse3 FFI code is API-compatible — same fuse_new_31, fuse_mount, fuse_loop_mt_31 symbols. Need to switch linking, handle library detection, resolve header conflicts with FUSE-T, and activate the FSKit system extension.
title: Switch FUSE backend from FUSE-T to macFUSE (FSKit)
